title: beck — local skills router for AI agents
meta_description: Stop burning tokens on skills your agent ignores. beck indexes SKILL.md files and serves them on demand via MCP. 200 flat tokens. 2MB binary. Zero network calls.
og_title: beck — your agent's skills, at its beck and call
og_description: Local skills router for AI agents. 200 flat tokens per session instead of 100,000. Single static Rust binary. MCP server included.
